sub_modules.bitrev_addr: Combinational bit-reversal address generator used to reorder input samples into bit-reversed order before iterative DIT FFT processing.
sub_modules.stage_addr_gen: Combinational generator that computes the butterfly pair indices (p_idx, q_idx) and the twiddle factor index for a given stage and pair iteration count, implementing the iterative radix-2 DIT indexing scheme.
sub_modules.twiddle_rom: Combinational ROM lookup providing Q1.15 fixed-point cos/sin twiddle factor values for indices 0-15, using base table for 0-8 and trigonometric symmetry for 9-15.
sub_modules.bfly_unit: Combinational radix-2 butterfly unit that performs complex multiplication of the second operand by the twiddle factor (with FFT/IFFT sign handling for conjugation) and computes the sum/difference outputs.
